[Page 5]
## Page 5

Orteronel for Metastatic Hormone-Sensitive Prostate Cancer



TABLE 1. Baseline Characteristics of Patients Included in the Primary Intention-To-Treat Analysis (N = 1,279)
|  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Characteristic | Orteronel (n = 638) | Bicalutamide (n = 641) |
| Median age, years (range) | 67.6 (46.1-90.0) | 68.1 (19.4-92.3) |
| Race, No. (%) | Race, No. (%) | Race, No. (%) |
| White | 539 (84) | 538 (84) |
| Black | 64 (10) | 71 (11) |
| Others | 35 (6) | 32 (5) |
| Zubrod PS, No. (%) | Zubrod PS, No. (%) | Zubrod PS, No. (%) |
| 0 | 416 (65) | 442 (69) |
| 1 | 197 (31) | 175 (27) |
| 2 | 21 (3) | 21 (3) |
| 3 | 3(<1) | 2(<1) |
| Missing | 1(<1) | 1(<1) |
| Gleason score at initial diagnosis, No. (%) | Gleason score at initial diagnosis, No. (%) | Gleason score at initial diagnosis, No. (%) |
| <7 | 46 (7) | 39 (6) |
| 7 | 165 (26) | 168 (26) |
| 8 | 123 (19) | 118 (19) |
| 9-10 | 249 (39) | 264 (41) |
| Missing | 55 (9) | 52 (8) |
| Median PSA level, ng/mL (range) | 27.2 (2.0-6,710.0) | 31.8 (2.0-6,651.2) |
| Bone pain, No. (%) | Bone pain, No. (%) | Bone pain, No. (%) |
| Yes | 158 (25) | 143 (22) |
| No | 480 (75) | 498 (78) |
| Bone metastases, No. (%) | Bone metastases, No. (%) | Bone metastases, No. (%) |
| Yes | 470 (74) | 482 (75) |
| No | 168 (26) | 159 (25) |
| Liver metastases, No. (%) | Liver metastases, No. (%) | Liver metastases, No. (%) |
| Yes | 16 (3) | 14 (2) |
| No | 622 (97) | 627 (98) |
| Other visceral metastases, No. (%) | Other visceral metastases, No. (%) | Other visceral metastases, No. (%) |
| Yes | 82 (13) | 72 (11) |
| No | 556 (87) | 569 (89) |
| Disease severity, No. (%) | Disease severity, No. (%) | Disease severity, No. (%) |
| Minimal | 328 (51) | 328 (51) |
| Extensive | 310 (49) | 313 (49) |
| Preregistration LHRH suppression, No. (%) | Preregistration LHRH suppression, No. (%) | Preregistration LHRH suppression, No. (%) |
| Yes | 330 (52) | 331 (52) |
| No | 308 (48) | 310 (48) |
| Bisphosphonate use at study entry, No. (%) | Bisphosphonate use at study entry, No. (%) | Bisphosphonate use at study entry, No. (%) |
| Yes | 39 (6) | 35 (5) |
| No | 599 (94) | 606 (95) |
| Prior radical prostatectomy, No. (%) | Prior radical prostatectomy, No. (%) | Prior radical prostatectomy, No. (%) |
| Yes | 167 (26) | 148 (23) |
| No | 471 (74) | 493 (77) |
| Prior bilateral orchiectomy, No. (%) | Prior bilateral orchiectomy, No. (%) | Prior bilateral orchiectomy, No. (%) |
| Yes | 4 (1) | 3 (1) |
| No | 634 (99) | 638 (99) |



Abbreviations: LHRH, luteinizing hormone-releasing hormone; PS, performance score; PSA, prostate-specific antigen.
ªZubrod performance status scores range from 0 to 3, with higher scores reflecting greater disability.
